$comment: Zenodo metadata template for the NEXT tt-trinity-phi deposition. The DOI for this release has NOT yet been minted; the existing line-level DOI 10.5281/zenodo.19227877 covers the prior TRI-NET Trinity Stack bundle. See docs/RELEASE_MANIFEST_TRINET_V1.md for the deposition manifest and the explicit anti-claim.
title: tt-trinity-phi — TRI-1 Phi (φ-anchor): verification hardening layer
description: Apache-2.0, open-PDK (SKY130A) Tiny Tapeout chip — the φ-anchor reference SKU of the TRI-NET line (phi / e-engine / γ-surface). This release adds a machine-checkable verification layer on top of the v1.0 RTL: a normative claims matrix indexing every numerical claim with anti-claims; golden NMSE reference vectors for GF16 vs bfloat16 (R5-honest, RTL_ONLY provenance); D2D conformance vectors (valid header, bad CRC, unsupported opcode, timeout/retry, multi-chip ordering); a Triple-Decker state-machine spec (IDLE → RBB → FBB → CAP_BOOST → IDLE with brownout / overcurrent fallback); and a spec CI gate. No RTL semantics changed and no measured-silicon claims are made.

creators.name: Vasilev, Dmitrii
creators.$comment_creators: Single creator inferred from info.yaml `project.author` field; update or extend before deposition is published.

related_identifiers.$comment: TRI-NET Trinity Stack provenance bundle (prior release).
Placeholder for the concept DOI assigned by Zenodo when this release is published. Do NOT quote until published.

publication_date_$comment: Set automatically by Zenodo upon publication; do NOT pre-populate before deposition.
doi_$comment: DO NOT FILL — Zenodo mints the DOI on publication. Quoting a DOI before publication is an R5 honesty violation; see docs/VERIFICATION_CLAIMS_MATRIX.md row VC-NM-6.
notes: R5-honest posture preserved: no measured-silicon TOPS/W, no measured NMSE, no fabrication or yield data. Numbers in the bundled docs are labelled MEASURED (CI evidence), PRE-SILICON simulation, PROJECTED (architectural), SPEC (contract), or NOT MEASURED (anti-claim). See docs/VERIFICATION_CLAIMS_MATRIX.md and docs/RELEASE_MANIFEST_TRINET_V1.md.
references: Akopyan et al. — TrueNorth, IEEE TCAD 2015.
Modha et al. — IBM NorthPole, Science 2023 (DOI: 10.1126/science.adh1174).
